Position Overview Job Title: Web Developer Corporate Title: Associate Location: Mumbai, India Role Description Deutsche India Pvt Ltd is Deutsche bank’s global platform for front-office & aligned functions to create value by utilizing non-traditional locations, exceptional talent, and a collaborative culture. This branch of Deutsche Bank Group company is looking for extremely bright candidates for the Group Strategic Analytics (GSA) team in India. GSA is the bank’s center of excellence for all analytical effort within the bank. It has a footprint in global hubs like London, New York, Frankfurt, Berlin, Tokyo & Singapore. The candidate hired in this role is required to work in collaboration with global team in London to develop frontend of a web application. Candidate/Applicant is required to develop User Interface as per the business requirements in uWSGI server container. Candidate/Applicant is required to have strong experience in Angular, Typescript, HTML

jobs.title: Data Analyst
skills: Review, clean, and maintain large volumes of transactional and investment data.
Identify discrepancies, missing data, and inconsistencies requiring correction.
Prepare and support proof of claims related to securities litigation and class action settlements.
Manage and review custodian confirmations to validate securities claims.
Analyse investment transaction data and loss calculations using Excel, Access, and GPS tools
Compile, sort, organise, and present analytical results according to defined requirements.
Integrate data outputs from multiple systems and maintain them in secure repositories.
Export, update, and reconcile datasets on an ongoing basis as required
Accurately transfer data from PDF documents to Excel for routine and ad-hoc analysis.
Generate data summaries, overviews, and analysis reports upon request.
Efficiently transfer and input data across multiple applications and platforms.
Communicate findings, data issues, and analytical scenarios clearly to internal stakeholders.
Perform quality assurance (QA) checks and troubleshoot data-related issues.
Support additional tasks and responsibilities assigned by management.
Working knowledge of SQL, statistics, and data analysis methodologies
Advanced Microsoft Excel proficiency is mandatory. (Candidates without advanced Excel skills should not apply)
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office , particularly Excel and Access
Fundamental understanding of financial concepts , including financial statements and derivatives
Experience or familiarity with Python, R, SPSS, or Bloomberg is an advantage.
Prior experience in data research, validation, and reporting is preferred.
Strong interest in data integration, analysis, and validation
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and research skills
Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team
Proven ability to manage deadlines in high-pressure environments
Strong attention to detail with a data quality and QA mindset
jobs.description: info@digitalsolutiontech.com info@digitalsolutiontech.com  Toggle Navigation Home Latest Job Hiring Remote Job Private Jobs Latest Jobs & News Services Web Design & Development SEO Services Social Media Upcoming Exhibition Data Recruitment Find a Job Blog More About Contact Us  Toggle Navigation Home Latest Job Hiring Remote Job Private Jobs Latest Jobs & News Services Web Design & Development SEO Services Social Media Upcoming Exhibition Data Recruitment Find a Job Blog More About Contact Us Full Time Mumbai, Maharashtra, India Posted 2 months ago Website DRRT Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India Job Type: Full-Time Work Mode: On-Site Department: Data Analytics / Operations Company: DRRT DRRT is currently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Data Analyst to join our on-site team in Mumbai, Maharashtra . This role is ideal for professionals with strong advanced Excel skills , a solid understanding of financial data, and hands-on experience working with large transactional datasets. The successful candidate will support data review, validation, and analysis functions critical to securities litigation and class action settlement processes. If you are passionate about data accuracy , enjoy solving complex data problems, and are comfortable working in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment, this Data Analyst job in Mumbai offers an excellent opportunity for career growth and exposure to real-world financial data operations. About the Role As a Data Analyst at DRRT , you will be responsible for reviewing, maintaining, and analysing investment transaction and loss calculation data. The role involves extensive use of Microsoft Excel (advanced level), Microsoft Access, DRRT GPS systems , and other analytical tools to ensure data accuracy and completeness. You will work closely with internal teams to identify data deficiencies, recommend corrections, and support the preparation of proof of claims for class action settlements .
